## Pre-Entry Checklist (run for each before placing any order)

- [ ] Price > 50-day MA?
- [ ] S&P 500 > 200-day MA? *(futures suggest yes, confirm at open)*
- [ ] RSI (14) < 70?
- [ ] No earnings within 3 trading days? *(check earnings calendar — OXY/SLB/NEM Q1 season may have passed but verify)*
- [ ] No adverse pre-market news catalyst?
- [ ] Position size ≤ $5,000 (~5% of $100k portfolio)?

**Strongest conviction sector today is Energy (OXY, SLB) given oil is the single largest mover. If RSI is already extended on any name, skip it — no chasing.**
